notes: The world's leading sheetfed offset maker. Speedmaster range spans B3 (SX 52) to B1 (XL 106). Prinect workflow, Push-to-Stop autonomous printing, AutoPlate plate changers.
Major Japanese sheetfed offset maker. Lithrone G series with KHS-AI control and H-UV/LED-UV instant curing. G37 (A1) to G40/G44 (B1+).
Ryobi-Mitsubishi Heavy Industries joint venture (2014). Pioneered LED-UV offset. RMGT 9 Series defines the A1-plus '8-up' format between A1 and B1; Insta.Color AI ink control.
